name: Basecamp
description: Drive Basecamp 4 (project & team collaboration) from any AI agent: projects, todo lists, todos, messages, comments, people. 12 tools, OAuth2 Bearer auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Basecamp 4 API (37signals.com — github.com/basecamp/bc3-api).

**Setup**:
1. Register an integration at https://launchpad.37signals.com/integrations.
2. Implement OAuth2 authorization-code flow with `https://launchpad.37signals.com/authorization` (response includes user's account_id).
3. Set `BASECAMP_ACCESS_TOKEN` to the obtained access token.
4. Set `BASECAMP_ACCOUNT_ID` to your Basecamp account ID (a 6-9 digit number — visible in any Basecamp URL or returned by the OAuth identity endpoint).

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${BASECAMP_ACCESS_TOKEN}`.

**Account-scoped base URL**: every Basecamp account has its own subdomain. The API URL is `https://3.basecampapi.com/${BASECAMP_ACCOUNT_ID}/...`. The adapter substitutes the account ID via env var template.

**User-Agent header**: Basecamp REQUIRES a meaningful User-Agent header on every request (their support staff need it to identify integrations). The adapter sets `User-Agent: AnythingMCP (https://anythingmcp.com)` automatically.

**Resource model**:
  - **Project** (called 'Basecamp' in the UI) — the top-level container.
  - **Dock** — array of tools enabled on the project (todoset, message_board, schedule, vault, chat, etc.) each with its own URL.
  - **Todoset** → multiple **Todolists** → multiple **Todos**.
  - **Message Board** → multiple **Messages**.
  - **Comments** can be attached to most recordings (todos, messages, etc.).

**Recordings**: Basecamp's underlying primitive. A todo, message, comment, etc. is all a 'recording' with an `id` and a `type`. Many endpoints accept any recording_id and dispatch by type.

**Person picker**: assignees are people IDs. List them via `basecamp_get_people` (account-wide) or per-project.

**Status of completed todos**: completed=true sends a Boolean — not a separate endpoint. To 'reopen' a todo, send completed=false on the same todo.

**Pagination**: 50 per page typical, Link header gives `next` URL. Some endpoints return all in one shot.

**Rate limits**: 50 req per 10 sec per account. On 429 honor Retry-After.

**Out of scope here**: Hill Charts, automatic check-ins, schedule entries, vault (file upload), Pings (DMs), Chat (Campfire) — all addressable via the API but each have idiosyncratic URLs returned by the Project dock; out of scope for this MVP connector.

tools.name: basecamp_get_my_profile
tools.description: Return the authenticated user's profile (id, name, email_address, time_zone, avatar_url, can_manage_projects, etc.).

tools.name: basecamp_list_projects
tools.description: List active projects (Basecamps) the user has access to. Each project has id, name, description, dock[], purpose ('topic' or 'team').

tools.name: basecamp_get_project
tools.description: Fetch a single project with its dock — the array of tools (todoset, message_board, etc.) each with an `id` and `url`. You'll grab the todoset_id and message_board_id from here.

tools.name: basecamp_list_todolists
tools.description: List todolists within a project's todoset. Get the todoset_id from basecamp_get_project's dock[type=todoset].id.

tools.name: basecamp_list_todos
tools.description: List todos in a todolist. Pass status=completed to see done items, archived to see archived.

status.description: completed or archived. Omit for active.

tools.name: basecamp_create_todo
tools.description: Create a todo in a todolist. Required: content. Assignees + notify are arrays of person IDs.

assignee_ids.description: Array of person IDs to assign.

notify.description: If true, notify assignees on create.

tools.name: basecamp_complete_todo
tools.description: Mark a todo as completed. Use basecamp_uncomplete_todo to reopen.

tools.name: basecamp_list_messages
tools.description: List messages on the project's message board. Get the message_board_id from basecamp_get_project's dock[type=message_board].id.

tools.name: basecamp_post_message
tools.description: Post a new message on the project's message board.

subscriptions.description: Array of person IDs to subscribe to replies.

tools.name: basecamp_add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a recording (todo, message, document, etc.). recordingId is the ID of whatever you're commenting on.

recordingId.description: ID of the recording to comment on.

tools.name: basecamp_get_people
tools.description: List all people in the Basecamp account. Returns id, name, email_address, time_zone, can_manage_projects, can_manage_people.
